name: There is a useful piece of gear on a W Corp. Cleanup Agent who was turned into a Bloodbag.
desc:
W Corp. Agents who turned into Bloodbags made for higher difficulty enemies than the other Bloodbags aboard the train.

Once they were defeated, we found a strange-looking gear from the aftermath of the battle.

I'd seen a W Corp. Identity with that gauntlet before.

"This gear is gunked up with gore; it'll be difficult to use it as-is."

Looks like we'll have to go through considerable trouble to bring it back to working order...

options.messageDesc: Wrath & Gloom Advantage check. Pass to gain a Bleed E.G.O Gift.

result:
We don't have the luxury of wasting our time over something like this.

Leaving the gauntlet behind, we forged on.

1.title: There is a useful piece of gear on a W Corp. Cleanup Agent who was turned into a Bloodbag.
successDesc:
{0} manages to pry the gear free from the gore.

"Oh..."

But something seems to have messed up the gauntlet during the process, and now it won't activate.
failureDesc:
{0} ends up getting a gash on the hand while trying to pry the gear free from the gore.

"... We might get it working if we can find circuit 7B."

One of the Sinners makes a suggestion. Doing so, however, might strain {0}'s wounded hand even further.

Is it worth the effort?
